title: $underline
text: $underline Return the result of applying the underline character attribute to a string. $underline ( String ) Example: MY_UNIFIELD = $underline("aaabbb") Parameters Table 1. Parameters Parameter Data Type Description String String String, field, variable, or function that evaluates to a string. Return Values The $underline function returns the result of applying the underline character attribute to String Use Use in Form components, but only applicable to Unifields. Description The result of $underline is visible only in a displayed unifield. The following example shows the result of applying $underline to a string and storing it in a Unifield: MY_UNIFIELD = $underline("aaabbb") Copy Afterwards, MY_UNIFIELD contains " aaabbb ". Related Links $stripattributes Return the result of removing character attributes, frames, and rulers from a string. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
